slides.hook: Build AI sales workflows — no coding required
slides.body: SalesCloser received a U.S. patent for its graph-based AI system. This technology enables the creation of sales workflows without any coding, streamlining business processes and enhancing efficiency.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal, structured layout with black/white base and orange accent. Left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Daily 'AI for Work' Pulse: 3rd of May
